personal.name: Ahmed Hamzah
personal.title: Senior Backend Developer | Python & Django Specialist | AI/ML Integration Expert
personal.tagline: Building robust web applications with clean code
personal.bio: Results-driven Senior Backend Developer with 3+ years of professional experience architecting and deploying scalable, high-performance backend systems using Python, Django, and Django REST Framework. Proven expertise in leading development teams, managing multiple concurrent projects, and delivering AI/ML-integrated platforms serving 10,000+ active users.

summary.highlight: Specialized in RESTful API design, database optimization, authentication systems (JWT, RBAC), and automated trading solutions. Strong track record of improving system performance by 30-40%, reducing deployment bugs by 30%, and achieving 100% on-time project delivery.

experience.role: Senior Django Backend Developer / Team Lead
experience.description: Led cross-functional backend team of 5 developers and supervised frontend team, achieving 100% on-time delivery across all projects while fostering seamless collaboration between development teams.
highlights: Architected and developed 40+ scalable RESTful API endpoints using Django and Django REST Framework
Established and maintained enterprise-grade internal platforms for 3 major institutions, supporting 5,000+ daily active users with 99.9% uptime
Implemented comprehensive security framework with JWT-based authentication and Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
Optimized PostgreSQL and MySQL database schemas and queries, achieving 25-40% performance improvements
Integrated real-time communication features and asynchronous background processing using Celery and Redis

experience.description: Designed and deployed 5+ independent backend systems from concept to production, serving over 10,000 active users with high-concurrency support and horizontal scalability.
highlights: Engineered high-frequency algorithmic trading bots with advanced risk management, achieving up to 5% average monthly returns
Developed AI-powered Real Estate platform integrated with Machine Learning models for property analysis
Implemented secure RESTful APIs with comprehensive authentication and API documentation (Swagger/OpenAPI)
Built custom admin dashboards and control panels for managing 50+ system configurations
Optimized database architectures for 5M+ records, reducing query execution time by 35%

projects.title: Real Estate Platform Backend with ML Integration
projects.description: Developed comprehensive Django backend managing 2,000+ property listings for real estate sale and rental operations. Integrated machine learning models for property data analysis, price prediction, and automated market insights generation.

projects.title: Fashion E-commerce APIs
projects.description: Architected modular backend API platform with 15+ microservices including product catalog, user management, order processing, and analytics dashboards.

projects.title: AI-Driven Algorithmic Trading System
projects.description: Built ML-driven trading framework processing 1,000+ automated trades monthly across 10+ market scenarios with real-time decision-making capabilities.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: Full-featured e-commerce platform built with Django, featuring product management, shopping cart, secure payments, and order tracking.

projects.title: Task Management API
projects.description: RESTful API for task management with authentication, team collaboration, and real-time notifications using Django REST Framework.

projects.title: Content Management System
projects.description: Custom CMS for bloggers with rich text editing, media management, SEO optimization, and scheduled publishing.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Management Information Systems
